workflows.name: FASTA summary
workflows.description: Built-in sequence counts, length, GC percent, and per-record report.

workflows.name: seqkit stats
workflows.description: Runs seqkit stats on FASTA or FASTQ files.

workflows.name: FastQC quality check
workflows.description: Runs FastQC and writes the report into the run output folder.

workflows.name: BLASTN search
workflows.description: Runs local BLASTN against a database path that you provide.
command: 6 qseqid sseqid pident length mismatch gapopen qstart qend sstart send evalue bitscore
